title: 挖机视频 — 机器展示
description: 我们的挖机真实工作视频，展示机器的操作性能、液压系统和工况表现。欢迎联系了解更多详情。

title: Komatsu PC200-8 in Operation
description: A Komatsu PC200-8 working on a real construction site. See the machine's power, hydraulic performance, and smooth operation in real-world conditions.

title: Hitachi ZX200 Inspection Process
description: Behind the scenes of our 72-point inspection. Watch our technicians check every critical system — engine, hydraulics, tracks, and structural integrity.

title: Machine Loading — Guangzhou Port
description: Watch how we prepare and load excavators for ocean freight at Guangzhou Port. Proper lashing, containerization, and documentation for smooth customs clearance.

title: Kobelco SK200 — Customer Demo
description: A Kobelco SK200-8 demonstrated for a visiting customer from Africa. Full operational demo including trenching, grading, and load testing.

title: Hyundai R210 — Walkaround & Specs
description: Complete walkaround of a Hyundai R210VS. Detailed look at the engine bay, hydraulic pump, track tension, and bucket, plus full spec breakdown.
